promptfoo.name: Promptfoo
promptfoo.note: Large model evaluation, prompt injection, and agent security testing – suitable for pre-deployment risk checks in AI applications.

openhands.name: OpenHands
openhands.note: An open-source project for code agents, aiming to help AI complete more complex software work in real repositories and workflows.

continue.name: Continue
continue.note: Embeds code assistant directly into editor workflows, suitable for daily development tasks like completion, Q&A, and modification.

langfuse.name: Langfuse
langfuse.note: Focuses on LLM application tracing, observability, and evaluation, ideal for online quality tracking.
